title: Service Has Candidate CVE Mappings
description: Service fingerprinting mapped to one or more candidate CVEs requiring validation.
impact: Known-vulnerability candidates may represent exploitable risk if version and exposure are confirmed.
likelihood: Medium pending manual verification of affected versions and exploitability.
recommendations: Validate software version and affected build details.
Prioritize high-severity CVEs for remediation or compensating controls.
Track CVE validation status in remediation workflow.
